title: Design Dashboard's calendar view with any column
excerpt: I’m looking for the option where I can design the calendar view with any column not with the Item name.

posts.author: Techie (Techie)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m looking for the option where I can design the calendar view with any column not with the Item name.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Techie, thanks for sharing this suggestion! To clarify, you’d like for column names to display in the calendar (specific to the date set), not the item? Would you be happy to elaborate a little further for us?
